description_long: This is a classic low-top sneaker with a predominantly white leather upper and three bold black stripes on the side, characteristic of Adidas Superstar shoes. The toe cap is made of a textured rubber shell, providing both durability and a distinctive look. The heel tab is black with a white Adidas trefoil logo, while the tongue features a gold Adidas label. The shoe has white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern and a white midsole and outsole. The overall silhouette is rounded at the toe and slightly padded around the collar for comfort. The shoe appears clean, well-constructed, and in new condition, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A white low-top sneaker with black Adidas stripes, a rubber shell toe, and gold and black branding details. The shoe is clean, well-made, and ideal for everyday urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing three black Adidas stripes, the 'SUPERSTAR' label, and the white leather upper.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the textured rubber shell toe, white laces, and gold Adidas tongue label.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with three black stripes and a clear view of the shoe's profile and stitching.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the black heel tab with a white Adidas trefoil logo and the padded collar.
attribute_logo: White Adidas trefoil logo on black heel tab, gold Adidas label on tongue
